word: G5245 - ὑπερνικάω - hypernikáō - hoop-er-nik-ah'-o - More than conquer

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑπερνικάω

- Transliteration: Hupernikao

- Phonetic: hoop-er-nik-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to be more than a conqueror, to gain a surpassing victory

- Origin: from G5228 and G3528

- TDNT entry: 19:42,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5228 and G3528; to vanquish beyond that is gain a decisive victory: - more than conquer.
